name: @eqlcc/session-service
description: Thin typed session-service seam (issue #23, docs/SESSION_SERVICE_SPEC.md): composes the durable ingest pipeline, the projection driver, and the analytics read API into UI-ready live view-models. The single control point the desktop tracker consumes over IPC — the UI imports only this package's view types, never parser/DB/projector internals. Pure TS; caller-driven pull seam (no hidden clocks/timers).
